name: Challa Golden Egg Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the breadmaker pan in the order listed.
2. Select white bread setting and start the machine.
3. When the breadmaker stops (first rise), remove the dough.
4. In a flat manner, braid the dough, making sure the middle strand goes under and over, never across.
5. Brush the braided dough with an egg wash.
6. Bake at 350°F until lightly browned.
7. Sprinkle seeds (such as sesame or poppy) on top before serving.
